title: SPBR x Fresh Animations: Extensions
description: An addon for the SPBR x Fresh Animations patch. Now the Extensions get an extended support!
body:
This is an addon for my [SPBR x Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/spbr-x-fresh-animations) compatibility patch! 

I wasn't able to put everything there, because some **Fresh Animations** textures are not compatible with the **Fresh Animations: Extensions**, so I made a separate resource pack to fix extra issues.

Here is the recommended load order:
![Load order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5172fbae03bcae91f506fd038ad1a366d13f81a8.png)
